faq.question: What does Terkib23 build?
faq.answer: Terkib23 designs and develops multilingual websites, landing pages, and corporate websites.

faq.question: Which languages are supported?
faq.answer: The studio currently supports Turkish, German, English, and Arabic.

faq.question: How can a client request an offer?
faq.answer: Clients can use the contact form on the website or send an email to han23studio@gmail.com.
